# Agentic Distribution

Source pack: `.agent-context/skills/distribution/`

## Load These Files

1. `.agent-context/skills/distribution/README.md`
2. `.agent-context/skills/distribution/compatibility.md`
3. `.agent-context/skills/distribution/publish.md`
4. `.agent-context/skills/distribution/rollback.md`
5. `.agent-context/skills/distribution/provenance-attestation.md`

## Workflow

1. Validate compatibility before publish.
2. Ensure release artifacts are traceable and reproducible.
3. Define rollback trigger and rollback command path.
4. Record post-release verification evidence.
